violations.text: Allergy statement was lacking on the menus. Allergy statement to be added to menu. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. PIC relocated food at time of inspection. Guidance document provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of bio-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was unplugged. Ice voluntarily disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Knives were observed stored between prep tables. Items were relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025
Lowboy door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

The floors near the walls in the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety certified with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use 3-bay until dish machine is serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Knives were observed stored between prep table. Knives were moved to 3-bay sink. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024
The non food contact surfaces of the ice machine was observed with an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024
The establishment does not have an allergen statement present for consumer awareness. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023

Raw animal foods (such as shrimp) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as mushrooms and chicken) in the flip top prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023

Meat was observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023
Knives were observed stored in-between unclean surfaces of the prep units. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023
